## Summary
Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test or CI improvement
- [ ] Release/process change

## Related Issues
Closes #
Related to #

## Validation
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make eval`
- [ ] Org scenario smoke (if behavior affecting examples, caching flow, or CI paths)
- [ ] Manual verification (if applicable)

## Checklist
- [ ] I self-reviewed the diff
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, `.env`, or other local-only files
- [ ] I updated docs for any workflow or behavior change
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` if this change should appear in release notes
- [ ] I added or updated tests when the change increased regression risk

## Notes For Reviewers
Anything specific you want reviewers to focus on.
